'''''Cataclysm Prism 4''''' was a [[Holodrama/Legends|holodrama]] released in the [[Summer/Legends|summer]] of<ref name="Hnn" /> [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="Date" /> Prior to it's release, [[Core World Critics Association]] president [[Jaysa Namoor]] criticized the film for it's writing before she even saw it.<ref name="Hnn" />
